name: chart
title: Chart Widget
description: The dashboard's core time-series chart renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="chart") is filled by the OOW.chart renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a 4-row gridline backdrop, right-aligned y-axis labels, and one or more seeded series drawn as smooth cubic-bezier line/area paths or rectangular bars. Seven styles — area, line, bar, sbar (semi bars), hbar (horizontal top-N), sarea, sline — plus a multi option for overlaid series. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so charts render identically every load. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath / SVAR utils; grid and labels are decoupled from the series colour and themed from design tokens. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment.
